examples: My fond hope is that we will be ready by Christmastime.
Chestnuts can be used at Christmastime, as a stuffing for turkey, guinea fowl, or chicken.
For a special treat at Christmastime, use eggnog.
Each year, the Peruvian province of Chumbivilcas hosts the vibrant Christmastime festival of Takanakuy.
The Christmastime seasonal "Swaddling Ale, " for example, was a bit too heavy on spruce-tree extract.
